text.title: Viral Loops and Types Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use when in doubt about which variant to apply.

decision-tree.root-question: Do all Applies-If preconditions hold and no Skip-If trigger fires?

conclusion.verdict: do not run this methodology; document skip rationale
pick one primary archetype; secondary optional
switch to archetype matching product nature
reset target inside empirical range for chosen archetype

text.example: preconditions=true → readiness gates evaluated → all_checks_pass==true → conclusion ref=incentive-must-not-exceed-cac
